member.name: M:CometEditor::FileEditorSystem::GetLocalConfigDirectory()
member.summary: Returns the local config directory for the current opened project.

member.name: M:CometEditor::FileEditorSystem::GetGlobalConfigDirectory()
member.summary: Returns the global config directory for the current user. This directory is shared between all the projects and should be used for settings that are not project specific.
